title: tragacantha globosa
intro: Tragacantha globosa, also known as the globe salsify, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its rich source of inulin, a type of soluble fiber that has been shown to have various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Tragacantha globosa include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, manage blood sugar levels, and act as a natural laxative, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and dried root, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
